children.name:
RuntimeError: Human validation page detected in CI — cannot proceed headlessly.
Fix: generate data/auth_state.json with utils/save_auth_state.py,
     store it as a CI secret, and set the AUTH_STATE_PATH env var.
Screenshot: screenshots/human_validation_detected_20260316_173912.png
